nodes.label: Verify the reason string contains at least one dollar amount.
nodes.norm_label: verify the reason string contains at least one dollar amount.

nodes.label: Verify synthetic data looks like real daily business transactions.
nodes.norm_label: verify synthetic data looks like real daily business transactions.

nodes.label: $10k cash, $5k reserve, net positive ~$100/day → buy $5k should be YES.
nodes.norm_label: $10k cash, $5k reserve, net positive ~$100/day → buy $5k should be yes.

nodes.label: $10k cash, $5k reserve, net negative ~$100/day → buy $5k should be NO.
nodes.norm_label: $10k cash, $5k reserve, net negative ~$100/day → buy $5k should be no.

nodes.norm_label: $6k cash, $5k reserve, net positive ~$100/day → buy $5k should be wait.

nodes.label: $5k cash, $5k reserve → buy $7k should be NO (can't afford).
nodes.norm_label: $5k cash, $5k reserve → buy $7k should be no (can't afford).

nodes.label: $5k cash, $5k reserve, net negative → buy $3k should be NO.
nodes.norm_label: $5k cash, $5k reserve, net negative → buy $3k should be no.

nodes.label: $15k cash, $5k reserve, net positive → buy $5k + $200/mo should be YES.
nodes.norm_label: $15k cash, $5k reserve, net positive → buy $5k + $200/mo should be yes.

nodes.label: $6k cash, $5k reserve, net small positive → buy $4k + $100/mo should be WAIT.
nodes.norm_label: $6k cash, $5k reserve, net small positive → buy $4k + $100/mo should be wait.

nodes.label: $10k cash, $9k reserve → buy $2k should be WAIT (barely above reserve).
nodes.norm_label: $10k cash, $9k reserve → buy $2k should be wait (barely above reserve).

nodes.label: $3k cash, $0 reserve, net positive → buy $2k should be YES (no reserve constrain
nodes.norm_label: $3k cash, $0 reserve, net positive → buy $2k should be yes (no reserve constrain

nodes.label: $12k cash, $5k reserve, net flat → buy $6k should be YES (stays above reserve).
nodes.norm_label: $12k cash, $5k reserve, net flat → buy $6k should be yes (stays above reserve).

nodes.label: Chart data should be consistent (no NaN, correct length).
